
EXAMPLES FOR CHAPTER 10 - "Fonts".

The examples for this chapter require 72 KB.
			
Files contained in this folder:				
	Manifest
	Z.ps (*)
	circle.ps
	clock.ps
	club.ps
	cmposite.ps
	deck1.ps
	deck2.ps (1)
	diamond.ps
	empty.ps
	hand1.ps
	hand2.ps
	heart.ps
	kern1.ps
	kern2.ps (*)
	kern3.ps
	oneeach.ps
	pscript.ps
	scrabble.ps (*)
	scrbble1.ps
	scrbble2.ps (*)
	spade.ps
	spade2.ps (2)
	suitfont.ps
	super1.ps (*)
	super2.ps (*)
	superfnt.ps (*)

(*)	Requires PostScript Level 2.

(1)	In the book, the procedure definitions for /Ace, /Two and
	/Four left out the call to another procedure CardOutline. The font
	on this disk has been fixed.
	
	Also, the line in procedure /Two reading
		BottomEdge		%  y position
	in the book should read (and now does in the example on the disk)
		BottomEdge 160 add	%  y position

	
(2)	The definition for /CardShape listed in the book does not give the
	proper results. The example disk has been fixed to draw the spade
	correctly.
	
